LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS DICKSON & ASSOCIATES, CPA AND MARC DICKSON'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AN AMENDED ANSWER AND CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. WITHIN 10 DAYS, DEFENDANTS DICKSON & ASSOCIATES, CPA AND MARC DICKSON SHALL FILE THEIR AMENDED GENERAL DENIAL AND CROSS-COMPLAINT. MR. ASCARRUNZ'S SOLE BASIS FOR OPPOSING THIS MOTION IS THE PROXIMITY OF THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE OF AUGUST 19, 2013. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 21, 2013. THE NEW TRIAL DATE SHALL BE DEEMED THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR ALL STATUTORY AND DISCOVERY PURPOSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CESAR ASCARRUNZ'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 30, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 19. 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CESAR ASCARRUNZ' MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT IS GRANTED BECAUSE DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND THIS COURT'S ORDER OF JULY 19, 2013. ON JULY 19, 2013, THE COURT ORDERED THE OPPOSING PARTY TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION. THE DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

Off Calendar Aug-13-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-22-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CESAR ASCARRUNZ' Motion To Amend Complaint is granted because defendant failed to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and this Court's order of July 19, 2013. On July 19, 2013, the Court ordered the opposing party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide a courtesy copy of the opposition. The defendant failed to comply with the order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Notice Of Motion To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-19-2013 Continued To Jul-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CESAR ASCARRUNZ's Motion To Amend Complaint is Continued to July 30, 2013 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 19. 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Moton For Leave To File An Amended Answer And X-Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs DICKSON & ASSOCIATES, CPA and MARC DICKSON's Motion For Leave To File An Amended Answer And Cross-Complaint IS Granted. Within 10 days, Defendants Dickson & Associates, CPA and Marc Dickson shall file their Amended General Denial and Cross-Complaint. Mr. Ascarrunz's sole basis for opposing this motion is the proximity of the current trial date of August 19, 2013. The trial date is continued to October 21, 2013. The new trial date shall be deemed the original trial date for all statutory and discovery purposes. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William Hughes, 415.397.2020, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Jeffrey Moss, Law Offices of Jeffrey A. Moss, 415.456.2566, appearing by Court Call for the Defendant.

Matter A R G U E D. Ruling: DEFENDANTS DICKSON & ASSOCIATES, CPA, MARC DICKSON'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interoggatories is Granted as to Interrogatories nos. 1, 2, 3 & 5. The motion is Denied as to Interrogatory no. 4. Sanctions are awarded to the moving party in the amount of $1,935.00. The prevailing party is to prepare the form of order. Brad Kaplan, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
